---
title: "Redirecting to Contact..."
pagetitle: "Redirecting..."
---

```{=html}
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://example.com/contact-us" />
<script type="text/javascript">
  window.location.href = "https://example.com/contact-us";
</script>

<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 70vh; text-align: center;">
  <h1>Redirecting to Contact...</h1>
  <div class="spinner"></div>
  <p>If you are not redirected automatically, <a href="https://example.com/contact-us">click here</a>.</p>
</div>

<style>
.spinner {
  border: 4px solid #f3f3f3;
  border-top: 4px solid #3498db;
  border-radius: 50%;
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
  margin: 20px auto;
}

@keyframes spin {
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
</style>
```
